title: Automated Reporting System for Ticket Monitoring
summary: End-to-end Python-based reporting system for internal workflow monitoring. Included backend data processing, scheduled report generation, and dashboard visibility, reducing manual monitoring and improving reporting transparency for managers.

title: Dynamic Dashboard with Automated Ticket Assignment
summary: Developed a full-stack internal web application using Python and Dash (Bootstrap) to support access management and automated ticket routing for internal workflows. Also explored the use of Amazon Bedrock and OpenAI models for AI-assisted recommendations and workflow support use cases. The solution improved workload distribution, reduced manual assignment effort, and provided real-time visibility for team leads and managers.

title: Location Mapping Application
summary: Web-based application developed using Python (Django), React, and PostgreSQL to manage and visualize location-related operational data. Built in collaboration with international teams, improving accuracy and internal data management.
